## What does this PR do?
<!-- Brief description -->

### Type
- [ ] 🆕 New project (added a folder under `projects/`)
- [ ] 🤝 Joining a project (added myself to a `CONTRIBUTORS.md`)
- [ ] 🚧 Work on an existing project (`src/` changes, docs, etc.)
- [ ] 🛠️ Repo / tooling change

---

### If adding a NEW project
- [ ] Created `projects/<name>/` from `templates/project-template/`
- [ ] Filled in `README.md` (summary, problem, solution, plan)
- [ ] Added myself to the project's `CONTRIBUTORS.md`
- [ ] Added a row to [`projects/README.md`](../projects/README.md)

### If JOINING a project
- [ ] Added myself to `projects/<name>/CONTRIBUTORS.md`

---

- [ ] I followed the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
